items.headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Wins Grant Thornton Role And Launches AI Agent Identity Tool
items.summary: CrowdStrike (NasdaqGS:CRWD) was selected by Grant Thornton Advisors LLC as the unified foundation for its managed security services, centered on the Falcon platform. The collaboration focuses on deploying AI-powered managed detection and response solutions for Grant Thornton’s global client base. CrowdStrike also introduced Continuous Identity for AI Agents, a new capability that applies real-time, risk-aware authorization and identity enforcement to AI agent activity in enterprise...

items.headline: Databricks strikes deal to buy Panther Labs in cybersecurity push
items.summary: Databricks said on Tuesday it had agreed to buy startup Panther Labs, as the U.S. ‌data analytics provider pushes deeper into the cybersecurity business.  The ‌acquisition, Databricks' third in this area, furthers its aim to compete with security management ​incumbents like CrowdStrike and Cisco's Splunk.  Databricks declined to comment on the deal terms.
